title: Shimon Even
body: Shimon Even (Hebrew: שמעון אבן; June 15, 1935 – May 1, 2004) was an Israeli computer science researcher. His main topics of interest included, algorithms, graph theory and cryptography. He was a member of the Computer Science Department at the Technion, since 1974. Shimon Even was the PhD advisor of Oded Goldreich, a prominent cryptographer.
categories: Academic staff of Technion – Israel Institute of Technology
